channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Spotify's Bold Move: Partner Program and the Future of Podcasting
item.description: Spotify's new Partner Program aims to revolutionize podcast monetization, but what does this mean for the future of audio and video content?
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Meta looking for 'sweetheart deal' with Trump: FTC chair
item.description: Outgoing Federal Trade Commission (FTC) Chair Lina Khan suggested Tuesday that Meta and other companies facing antitrust lawsuits from the agency might be looking for “sweetheart deals” from the incoming Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Biggest Nvidia takeaways from Jensen Huang's CES 2025 keynote
item.description: Nvidia’s stock is on the upswing after its CEO, Jensen Huang, unveiled a suite of new products, services and partnerships at CES 2025.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: This startup says its AI can speed insurance approval of health treatments
item.description: In recent years, doctors and patients have reported serious frustration with requirements from insurers for prior authorization before a laundry list of medical treatments and procedures can take place.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: Meta Expands Board with Trump Ally, Auto Tycoon, Tech Investor - AP News
item.description: Meta appoints three new members to its board of directors, including UFC's Dana White, auto tycoon John Elkann, and tech investor Charlie Songhurst.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: The Last of Us Season 2 Teaser Revealed at CES 2025 - What You Need to Know
item.description: The highly anticipated teaser for The Last of Us season 2 has been revealed, giving fans a glimpse into the show's upcoming sophomore outing.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: CIO, come crescere di ruolo e fare carriera nel 2025
item.description: Il CIO evolve da manager dell’IT a leader strategico, guidando la collaborazione tra dipartimenti e l’innovazione aziendale. La sinergia con le linee di business e l’adozione di tecnologie come l’intelligenza artificiale diventano essenziali.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The European political establishment has had enough of Elon Musk
item.description: Elon Musk has never been shy about sharing his opinions to his 211 million followers on X. But for those who follow him—and those who get his posts pushed into their feeds on the app—the past few weeks have been more unusual than most.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: UFC boss Dana White joining Meta's board of directors
item.description: Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC) CEO and President Dana White will join Meta’s board of directors, the social media company announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Rideshare Companies Prepare for Driverless Taxi Launch
item.description: Uber and Lyft prepare to launch driverless taxis, with concerns raised about software glitches and sensor disruptions.
item.dc:creator: Nancy Loo, NewsNation

item.title: CISA says 'no indication' other agencies impacted by Treasury hack
item.description: The Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) said Monday that there is “no indication” other federal agencies were impacted by the recent breach at the Treasury Department.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Fubo combining with Disney's Hulu + Live TV; lawsuit against Venu Sports settled
item.description: Disney’s Hulu + Live TV and sports streaming service Fubo are combining in a deal that will also see the settlement of a lawsuit against the creation of Venu Sports.
item.dc:creator: Michelle Chapman, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: L’Oréal’s new cosmetics counter device can predict your skin’s needs
item.description: Choosing skincare products often comes down to a matter of trial and error. A tabletop device unveiled by L’Oréal, called the L’Oréal Cell BioPrint, is intended to change that.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: China protests US sanctions for its alleged role in hacking, complains of foreign hacker attacks
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — China has slammed a decision by the U.S. Treasury to sanction a Beijing-based cybersecurity company for its alleged role in multiple hacking incidents targeting critical U.S. infrastructure, while the Chinese cyber security agency complained Monday of attacks on Chinese networks.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: What to expect from NaaS in 2025
item.description: Enterprises have been slow to adopt NaaS for a number of reasons, including lack of clarity on exactly what NaaS is, lack of a solid business case that NaaS saves money over the long term, and questions around security, visibility, control, and data privacy.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: NASA's Martian helicopter promises unprecedented views of the red planet
item.description: NASA's Ingenuity helicopter, which flew on Mars in April 2021, became the first aircraft to achieve powered, controlled flight on a planet other than Earth.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Elon Musk stays on brand following Tesla Cybertruck explosion
item.description: Elon Musk used his X account to defend the durability of Tesla's Cybertruck after the New Year's Las Vegas explosion.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Turo rentals emerge as common thread in Las Vegas Cybertruck and New Orleans deadly incidents
item.description: Turo faces scrutiny after tragic incidents involving rented vehicles, raising questions about security measures and regulatory frameworks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Health AI: How Apple can boost public health
item.description: Combined with its existing solutions, Apple’s strategic approach to artificial intelligence (AI) deployment could make a radical difference to public health. Here is how it could achieve that.
item.dc:creator: Computer World
